title: senecio rhizomatus
intro: Senecio rhizomatus, also known as groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to various parts of the world, including Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory problems. Groundsel can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
